locked_scope.output_intent: Check whether public target-specific OBO structural permit or plan-review evidence exists.

jurisdiction.likely_obo_or_ocbo: Davao City Office of the City Building Official

identity_caveats: Fixture packet for validator coverage; not a live target claim.

lane_results.question: Is there evidence that this building went through official OBO structural permit or plan-review processing?

best_sources.title: Fixture OBO permit review record
best_sources.publisher: Fixture Office of the Building Official
best_sources.supports: Fixture target-specific record showing civil/structural plans were reviewed for the stated permit scope.
best_sources.does_not_support: Does not certify current condition outside the record date and scope.

lane_results.answer_text: Public target-specific OBO structural permit or plan-review evidence was found for the stated permit scope.

integrated_answer.summary: Target-specific OBO structural permit or plan-review evidence was found for the fixture target.
integrated_answer.citizen_safe_summary: Public target-specific OBO structural permit or plan-review evidence was found for the stated scope. This is document evidence only and does not certify current earthquake safety.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_claim: A target-specific OBO structural permit or plan-review evidence record was found for the stated scope.

blocked_claims: Do not convert OBO review evidence into current safety certification.
